name: Filets of Sole in White Wine Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 White Wine Sauce For, Poached Fish (recipe)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-quart saucepan, combine clam juice, white wine, bay leaf, peppercorns, lite salt (if using), parsley, garlic, and 1/2 cup water. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer uncovered for 15 minutes.
2. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
3. Wipe filets with damp paper towels and sprinkle with lemon juice. Fold each fillet into thirds.
4. Arrange the folded filets in a shallow baking dish sprayed with non-fat cooking spray. Strain the clam juice mixture over the filets.
5. Cover the dish tightly with foil and poach fish in the oven for 15 minutes.
6. Drain the filets, reserving 1 cup of liquid for sauce (see sauce recipe). Keep the filets warm on a serving platter.
7. Make the sauce and pour it over the filets. Sprinkle with parsley and serve.
